# SEO Optimization Implementation Plan

> **For Claude:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task.

**Goal:** Make solvefree.com highly discoverable by search engines via robots.txt, a generated sitemap, improved metadata, Open Graph tags, JSON-LD structured data, and a GitHub footer link.

**Architecture:** Static export site (`output: "export"`), so no server-side routes run at request time. `sitemap.xml` is generated by a build script (`tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts`) that runs as a `prebuild` step and writes to `public/sitemap.xml`. Category pages are already server components; individual tool pages are `"use client"` so their metadata comes from the root layout title template and category-level context.

**Tech Stack:** Next.js 16 App Router, TypeScript, `tsx` (available via devDependencies), Tailwind CSS, lucide-react

---

### Task 1: Add robots.txt

**Files:**
- Create: `public/robots.txt`

**Step 1: Create the file**

```
User-agent: *
Allow: /
Sitemap: https://solvefree.com/sitemap.xml
```

**Step 2: Verify it appears in the build output**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: `out/robots.txt` exists

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add public/robots.txt
git commit -m "seo: add robots.txt allowing all crawlers"
```

---

### Task 2: Sitemap generation script

**Files:**
- Create: `scripts/generate-sitemap.ts`
- Modify: `package.json` — add `"prebuild"` script

**Step 1: Create the script**

```typescript
// scripts/generate-sitemap.ts
import { writeFileSync } from "fs";
import { join } from "path";
import { allCalculators } from "../src/data/calculators";

const BASE_URL = "https://solvefree.com";
const TODAY = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0];

// Collect unique category slugs from href like "/finance/mortgage" -> "finance"
const categories = [...new Set(allCalculators.map((c) => c.href.split("/")[1]))];

const urls: string[] = [
  // Homepage
  `  <url>
    <loc>${BASE_URL}/</loc>
    <lastmod>${TODAY}</lastmod>
    <priority>1.0</priority>
    <changefreq>weekly</changefreq>
  </url>`,
  // Category pages
  ...categories.map(
    (cat) => `  <url>
    <loc>${BASE_URL}/${cat}</loc>
    <lastmod>${TODAY}</lastmod>
    <priority>0.8</priority>
    <changefreq>weekly</changefreq>
  </url>`
  ),
  // Individual calculator pages
  ...allCalculators.map(
    (c) => `  <url>
    <loc>${BASE_URL}${c.href}</loc>
    <lastmod>${TODAY}</lastmod>
    <priority>0.7</priority>
    <changefreq>monthly</changefreq>
  </url>`
  ),
];

const xml = `<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<urlset xmlns="http://www.sitemaps.org/schemas/sitemap/0.9">
${urls.join("\n")}
</urlset>`;

const outPath = join(process.cwd(), "public", "sitemap.xml");
writeFileSync(outPath, xml, "utf-8");
console.log(
  `Sitemap written to public/sitemap.xml (${allCalculators.length} calculators + ${categories.length} categories + homepage)`
);
```

**Step 2: Add prebuild script to package.json**

In `package.json`, add to the `"scripts"` section:
```json
"prebuild": "tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts",
```
(Add this line before `"build"`.)

**Step 3: Verify sitemap generates correctly**

Run: `npx tsx scripts/generate-sitemap.ts`
Expected: Console prints `Sitemap written...` and `public/sitemap.xml` exists with valid XML.

Spot-check: `head -20 public/sitemap.xml` should show the XML header and homepage URL.

**Step 4: Run full build to confirm it integrates**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: Build succeeds and `out/sitemap.xml` exists.

**Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add scripts/generate-sitemap.ts package.json public/sitemap.xml
git commit -m "seo: add sitemap generation script with prebuild hook"
```

### Task 3: Improve root layout metadata

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/layout.tsx`

**Step 1: Update the metadata export**

Replace the existing `metadata` export with:

```typescript
export const metadata: Metadata = {
  metadataBase: new URL("https://solvefree.com"),
  title: {
    default: "SolveFree — Free Online Calculators",
    template: "%s | SolveFree",
  },
  description:
    "168+ free online calculators for math, finance, health, conversions, timers, electronics, AI, and more. No ads. No tracking. 100% browser-based.",
  keywords: [
    "free calculator",
    "online calculator",
    "math calculator",
    "mortgage calculator",
    "BMI calculator",
    "unit converter",
    "investment calculator",
    "percentage calculator",
    "scientific calculator",
    "loan calculator",
    "compound interest calculator",
    "health calculator",
    "electricity calculator",
    "AI token calculator",
    "timer",
    "stopwatch",
  ],
  alternates: {
    canonical: "https://solvefree.com",
  },
  openGraph: {
    type: "website",
    siteName: "SolveFree",
    title: "SolveFree — Free Online Calculators",
    description:
      "168+ free online calculators. No ads, no tracking. Math, finance, health, conversions, electronics, AI, and more.",
    url: "https://solvefree.com",
  },
  robots: {
    index: true,
    follow: true,
    googleBot: {
      index: true,
      follow: true,
    },
  },
};
```

**Step 2: Build and spot check**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: Build succeeds. Check `out/index.html` contains `og:title` and `canonical` link.

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/app/layout.tsx
git commit -m "seo: improve root metadata with OG tags, canonical, and expanded keywords"
```

---

### Task 4: Add JSON-LD structured data to homepage

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/app/page.tsx`

The homepage (`page.tsx`) is already a server component (no `"use client"`), so we can add a `<script>` tag directly. The JSON-LD content is a hardcoded static object — not user input — so using `dangerouslySetInnerHTML` here is safe.

**Step 1: Add JSON-LD to the HomePage component**

At the top of the returned JSX (before the hero `<div>`), insert a script tag. The full shape of the component should be:

```tsx
export default function HomePage() {
  const jsonLd = {
    "@context": "https://schema.org",
    "@type": "WebSite",
    name: "SolveFree",
    url: "https://solvefree.com",
    description:
      "Free online calculators for math, finance, health, conversions, timers, electronics, AI, and more.",
    potentialAction: {
      "@type": "SearchAction",
      target: {
        "@type": "EntryPoint",
        urlTemplate: "https://solvefree.com/?q={search_term_string}",
      },
      "query-input": "required name=search_term_string",
    },
  };

  return (
    <div>
      {/* NOTE: dangerouslySetInnerHTML is safe here — content is a hardcoded static object, not user input */}
      <script
        type="application/ld+json"
        dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: JSON.stringify(jsonLd) }}
      />
      {/* ... rest of existing JSX unchanged ... */}
```

**Step 2: Build and verify**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: Build succeeds. Check `out/index.html` for `application/ld+json` script tag.

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/app/page.tsx
git commit -m "seo: add JSON-LD WebSite structured data to homepage"
```

### Task 5: Improve category page metadata

The category pages are already server components with `metadata` exports. Enrich each with OG tags and a canonical URL.

**Files to modify** (all of these exist):
- `src/app/math/page.tsx`
- `src/app/finance/page.tsx`
- `src/app/health/page.tsx`
- `src/app/conversions/page.tsx`
- `src/app/timers/page.tsx`
- `src/app/computer/page.tsx`
- `src/app/electricity/page.tsx`
- `src/app/ai/page.tsx`
- `src/app/everyday/page.tsx`
- `src/app/network/page.tsx`
- `src/app/security/page.tsx`
- `src/app/physics/page.tsx`
- `src/app/rf/page.tsx`
- `src/app/space/page.tsx`

**Step 1: For each category page, add/update the metadata export**

Pattern (example for math — replicate for each category):

```typescript
export const metadata: Metadata = {
  title: "Math Calculators",
  description:
    "Free math calculators: scientific, percentage, fractions, exponents, logarithms, geometry, statistics, and more. No ads, no tracking.",
  openGraph: {
    title: "Math Calculators — SolveFree",
    description:
      "Free math calculators for percentages, fractions, geometry, statistics, and more.",
    url: "https://solvefree.com/math",
  },
  alternates: { canonical: "https://solvefree.com/math" },
};
```

Use these values per category:

| Category | Title | Description | Slug |
|---|---|---|---|
| Math | Math Calculators | Free math calculators: scientific, percentage, fractions, exponents, logarithms, geometry, statistics, and more. | /math |
| Finance | Finance Calculators | Free finance calculators: mortgage, compound interest, loan, retirement, investment, tax, and more. | /finance |
| Health | Health Calculators | Free health calculators: BMI, TDEE, calories, body fat, heart rate, sleep, macros, and more. | /health |
| Conversions | Unit Converters | Free unit converters: length, weight, temperature, speed, area, volume, data, cooking, and more. | /conversions |
| Timers | Timers & Clocks | Free timers and clocks: stopwatch, Pomodoro, world clock, date calculator, age, countdown. | /timers |
| Computer | Developer Tools | Free developer tools: JSON formatter, regex tester, Base64, UUID, hash generator, and more. | /computer |
| Electricity | Electronics Calculators | Free electronics calculators: Ohm's law, resistors, capacitors, voltage divider, wire gauge. | /electricity |
| AI | AI & ML Calculators | Free AI calculators: token estimator, API cost, model size, confusion matrix, softmax. | /ai |
| Everyday | Everyday Calculators | Free everyday calculators: GPA, fuel, paint, concrete, pizza, pet age, photography. | /everyday |
| Network | Network Calculators | Free network calculators: bandwidth, subnet, CIDR, WiFi, ports, and latency. | /network |
| Security | Security Tools | Free security tools: password strength, JWT decoder, entropy, hash comparison. | /security |
| Physics | Physics Calculators | Free physics calculators: velocity, force, energy, projectile motion, waves, thermodynamics. | /physics |
| RF | RF & Antenna Calculators | Free RF calculators: wavelength, path loss, VSWR, link budget, noise figure, coax. | /rf |
| Space | Space Calculators | Free space calculators: orbital mechanics, rocket equation, black holes, stellar physics. | /space |

**Step 2: Build**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: Build succeeds.

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/app/*/page.tsx
git commit -m "seo: enrich category page metadata with OG tags and canonical URLs"
```

### Task 6: Add GitHub link to footer

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/components/Footer.tsx`

**Step 1: Update the footer**

Full replacement of `src/components/Footer.tsx`:

```tsx
import { Calculator, Github } from "lucide-react";

export function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer className="bg-card border-t border-card-border mt-12">
      <div className="max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8">
        <div className="text-center text-sm text-muted">
          <p className="font-semibold text-foreground mb-1 flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5">
            <Calculator className="h-4 w-4" strokeWidth={2} />
            SolveFree
          </p>
          <p>Free calculators for everyone. No ads. No tracking. Ever.</p>
          <p className="mt-2">
            All calculations are performed in your browser — your data never
            leaves your device.
          </p>
          <p className="mt-3">
            <a
              href="https://github.com/cosinax/solvefree.com"
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener noreferrer"
              className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 text-muted hover:text-foreground transition-colors"
            >
              <Github className="h-4 w-4" />
              Open source on GitHub
            </a>
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}
```

**Step 2: Build and visually verify**

Run: `npm run build && npm run dev`
Expected: Footer shows GitHub icon and "Open source on GitHub" link at bottom of any page.

**Step 3: Commit**

```bash
git add src/components/Footer.tsx
git commit -m "feat: add GitHub link to footer"
```

---

### Task 7: Final verification

**Step 1: Run full build**

Run: `npm run build`
Expected: Zero errors. Build output in `out/`.

**Step 2: Verify key SEO files exist in out/**

```bash
ls out/robots.txt out/sitemap.xml
head -5 out/sitemap.xml
grep -c '<url>' out/sitemap.xml
```

Expected: Both files exist. `<url>` count should be 170+ (1 homepage + ~14 categories + ~168 tools).

**Step 3: Verify OG tags in HTML**

```bash
grep 'og:title\|og:description\|og:url\|canonical\|ld+json' out/index.html | head -20
```

Expected: OG title, description, url, canonical link, and JSON-LD script all present.

**Step 4: Done — no additional commit needed if all checks pass.**
